title: Feb 19, 2026Amazon and Shopify Are Now Half of U.S. E-CommerceAmazon and Shopify together now account for approximately 50% of U.S. e-commerce. Two models each reached maturity at roughly the same time. U.S. e-commerce has quietly organized itself around both, and the space between them is where every other player is now making its case.
